title: Parviz Khan
overview: Parviz Dehdari was the former coach of the Iranian national football team and the first head coach of the Persepolis team. This Movie is a product of Owj Media Art Organization and it's about Parviz Dehdari, one of the most different great coaches of Iran's national football team.
